values.name: Compassion
values.desc: We care deeply and serve with empathy.

values.name: Collaboration
values.desc: We believe in the power of partnership.

values.name: Integrity

impactTiers.title: Plant 5 Saplings
impactTiers.desc: Can help plant 5 native saplings and contribute to a greener, healthier community.

impactTiers.title: Stationary Supplies
impactTiers.desc: Can provide a stationery kit with notebooks, pens, pencils, and learning essentials for one child.

impactTiers.title: Health Check-Up
impactTiers.desc: Can support a basic health screening for one community member during a VAF health camp.

impactTiers.title: Provide a Meal
impactTiers.desc: Can help provide nutritious meals for children or elderly beneficiaries during a community outreach programme.

impactTiers.title: Sponsor Educational Resources
impactTiers.desc: Can sponsor educational resources for a student, including books and essential learning materials.

impactTiers.title: Mini Plantation drive
impactTiers.desc: Can support a mini plantation drive by covering saplings, protective guards, and volunteer logistics.

impactTiers.title: Community Health Camp
impactTiers.desc: Can help organize a community health camp, supporting medicines, basic diagnostic equipment, and volunteer coordination.

featuredCampaign.title: Green Tomorrow Initiative
featuredCampaign.description: A community-driven plantation drive to promote a greener and healthier environment for future generations.
